overall.description: A static first-person view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic high-rise apartment bedroom at night. The scene focuses on a television cycling through various advertisements, news broadcasts, and political campaign ads, with the neon-lit city visible through window blinds.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with entertainment system

agents.ego_description: stationary in the bedroom watching the television display various colorful advertisements

entered.detail: messy bed with white and grey sheets and pillows in the foreground
large windows with closed horizontal blinds showing dark cityscape outside
flatscreen TV on dark dresser displaying colorful advertisements and static
large illuminated fish tank with blue-green lighting containing aquatic life
red neon signage visible through the window behind the aquarium
open magazine or book resting on the bed sheets

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static view of a dimly lit futuristic bedroom. An unmade bed occupies the foreground while a television cycles through various colorful advertisements including a unicorn graphic and 'Just Ads' text. Through the window blinds, the dark city night is visible with neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom during news broadcast

events.description: television switches from advertisements to news broadcast featuring male news anchor

agents.ego_description: continuing to watch the television as it transitions to news programming

changed.from: displaying colorful advertisements and static noise
changed.to: displaying news broadcast with male anchor in suit

segments.scene_description: The bedroom scene remains static as the television transitions to a professional news broadcast. The male news anchor appears on screen against a blue studio background, delivering news content.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom during commercial break

events.description: television interrupts news with bright yellow commercial advertisement
television switches to colorful abstract animated advertisement

agents.ego_description: watching the television as it displays commercial advertisements interrupting the news

changed.from: displaying news broadcast with male anchor
changed.to: displaying yellow commercial then colorful abstract animation

segments.scene_description: The television interrupts the news broadcast with a commercial break, first showing a bright yellow advertisement, then transitioning to a vibrant abstract animation with swirling colors before the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom during extended news segment

events.description: television returns to news broadcast with male anchor after commercials

agents.ego_description: watching the news broadcast continue on the television

changed.to: displaying news broadcast with male anchor and news graphics

segments.scene_description: The television returns to the news broadcast, showing the male anchor delivering news content. The room remains unchanged with the aquarium glowing softly in the background and the city lights visible through the blinds.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom during political advertisement

events.description: television switches to political campaign advertisement with 'VOTE' text and candidate image

agents.ego_description: watching the television display a political campaign advertisement

changed.to: displaying political campaign advertisement with 'VOTE' text and candidate portrait

segments.scene_description: The television transitions to a political campaign advertisement featuring a candidate with 'VOTE' text prominently displayed. The static camera maintains its view of the bedroom as the advertisement plays to end the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a dimly lit futuristic bedroom as the focal point of the room, a television, cycles through a series of contrasting digital broadcasts. It begins with the screen displaying colorful advertisements and unicorn graphics, while the dark city night glows through the window blinds and an unmade bed sits in the foreground. As the broadcast shifts, the screen transitions to a professional news anchor against a blue studio backdrop before being interrupted by a bright yellow commercial and vibrant, swirling abstract animations. The scene then returns to the news anchor, with the soft glow of a background aquarium complementing the neon city lights, before finally shifting to a political campaign advertisement featuring a candidate and prominent vote text.
